name: Midway Holding AB (publ)
summary: Midway Holding AB (publ) operates as a conglomerate of small and medium enterprises in Sweden and rest of Nordic countries. The company operates in two segments, Technology Companies and Trading Companies. It sells new and used cars, spare parts, and accessories; and rents cars, as well as offers workshop services. The company also develops, produces, and markets equipment for converting plastic materials to rolled products; operates as a subcontractor; and offers customized system solutions. In addition, it imports and sells grinding and construction machines, lifting equipment, material handling equipment, air purifiers, industrial vacuums, and twister cleaning systems and lasers to construction industry. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
